title: DaintyOrder Resource Pack
description: This is a neat and orderly Minecraft resource pack with a resolution of 32x and a fresh overall color scheme, suitable for getting started with redstone.Strive to create the model resource package with the highest mod coverage!
body:
![Effects when used with BSL shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e330bcd063eb3f84e5529d1f806eaa2d9391f2.png)
■This is a neat and orderly resource pack. Strive to create the model resource package with the highest mod coverage! Moreover, every block in every different state will have exquisitely distinct models, resulting in an even greater number of models than the original game. There's no need to worry about performance issues, as the cullface optimization has been properly implemented on every face!

■Recommended for use with [BSL](https://bitslablab.com/bslshaders/) or [Nostalgia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/nostalgia-shader) shaders

■It is recommended to use [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or other alternative mods for a better experience

■For more images, please visit the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/daintyorder-resource-pack/gallery)

■To be supplemented

# Set a reminder

■If you're having trouble loading the resource pack—like if it crashes, fails to load, or takes forever—try extracting the .zip file into a folder. Loading it as a folder instead of a .zip file often fixes these issues!

■If you're having trouble loading the resource pack, sometimes you'll need to install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) as an extra dependency.

■If you load [embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), you may see a lot of visual errors, requiring you to Disabling the compact vertex format in Video Settings

■If you encounter issues such as strange flickering of the glowing text on Enchanting Tables or flickering of other glowing entities
1. Please go to Options-Video Settings-Shaders-Selective TAA in-game and set it to OFF

■If you encounter the problem that the villager group costume cannot be loaded normally
1. Please adjust Options-Video Settings-Performance-Fast Rendering to Off in the game

■If you encounter other problems such as strange flickering or opacity of leaves
1. Please adjust Options-Video Settings-Details-Trees to High Quality in the game

■If you encounter some blocks being inexplicably culled
1. Please adjust Options-Video Settings-MoreCulling-Block State Culling to Off in the game

If the problem is still not solved, please report the problem

# Acknowledgements
■If you like this resource pack, consider supporting on [donate](https://afdian.com/a/DaintyOrder) .

■Feel free to use this resource pack in your videos, livestreams, or social media content!
Commercial Use Allowed: You are permitted to monetize your content (YouTube ads, sponsorships, etc.) using this pack.
No Reselling: Direct reselling or redistributing the original pack files for profit is strictly prohibited.
Attribution: Please include the Modrinth link to this pack in your video description.
As long as you are creating content and helping spread the word, I'm all for it!
![thanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13ed6e1cc152bb01cc95b70d8da60d814775c2f.png)

I started DaintyOrder out of pure passion, but honestly, the cost of sustaining that love is anything but low. Balancing the daily grind of real life with the blocky world beneath my mouse and keyboard, I sometimes feel overwhelmed by anxiety. Every bit of support from you is more than just a donation—it's what keeps this project breathing.
